objects.prompt:
Crypt of Ruin
Base Structure & Environment:

The Pit: A gaping, jagged crater acting as the central focal point. The edges are framed with corrupted, dark-purple soil and fractured cobblestones that transition seamlessly into the standard dungeon floor.

Surrounding Decor: Weathered, moss-covered gravestones lean at uneven angles around the perimeter. Heaps of bleached white skulls and rusted, broken weapons are half-buried in the dirt.

Lighting & VFX: A sickly, luminescent green glow emanates from the deep center of the pit, casting harsh, static shadows on the surrounding rocks. A continuous, low-opacity fog rolls over the edges, created by soft-edged mist sprites drifting lazily across the ground layer.
